title: Set 04 - Certificate Authorities, Fields, Revocation & Key Protection
subject: Cyber Security
topic: Certificate Authorities, Fields, Revocation & Key Protection

questions.question: What is the role of a certificate authority?
questions.description: A CA validates identity and signs certificates that relying parties can verify.

questions.question: Which certificate field identifies the entity the certificate is issued to?
questions.description: The subject field contains identity information for the certificate holder.

questions.question: Which mechanism can show that a certificate has been revoked?
questions.description: OCSP lets clients check certificate revocation status.

questions.question: What must be protected most carefully by a certificate holder?
questions.description: A compromised private key allows attackers to impersonate or decrypt depending on the use case.
